channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Father and son, business development reps a generation apart
item.description: Starting out in sales as a business development rep (BDR) is like boot camp for the business world. You learn resilience, understand rejection, and develop grit—qualities that stick with you throughout your career.
item.dc:creator: Jason Zintak, Fast Company

item.title: Apple's New Mac Mini: Compact Design and Environmental Achievements
item.description: Discover the innovative design and environmental achievements of Apple's new Mac Mini computer, featuring compact size, modular storage, and recycled materials.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Better together? Why AWS is unifying data analytics and AI services in SageMaker
item.description: Data warehousing, business intelligence, data analytics, and AI services are all coming together under one roof at Amazon Web Services.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Get ready to build your own Lego masterpieces with this new tech
item.description: Brick My World is an innovative app that allows you to turn any object into a Lego creation with your phone using advanced artificial intelligence and mobile scanning technology.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: From outsider to the Oval Office, bitcoin surges as a new administration embraces crypto
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Born from the ashes of the 2008 global financial crisis, bitcoin arrived after trust had withered in the financial system and in Washington's ability to protect those who must participate in it.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The role of governance in AI: Building trust
item.description: Generative artificial intelligence (AI) is hot property when it comes to investment, but there’s a pronounced hesitancy around adoption. AI faces a fundamental trust challenge due to uncertainty over safety, reliability, transparency, bias, and ethics.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: White House says at least 8 US telecom firms, dozens of nations impacted by China hacking campaign
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A top White House official on Wednesday said at least eight U.S. telecom firms and dozens of nations have been impacted by a Chinese hacking campaign.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Challenges and Complexities Surrounding AI Implementation in Government Agencies
item.description: Discover the challenges and complexities surrounding artificial intelligence (AI) implementation in government agencies, including efficient use of resources, climate concerns, cost-effectiveness, and policy guidance.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: District of Columbia says Amazon secretly stopped fast deliveries to 2 predominantly Black ZIP codes
item.description: The District of Columbia sued Amazon on Wednesday, alleging the company secretly stopped providing its fastest delivery service to residents of two predominantly Black neighborhoods while still charging millions of dollars for a membership that promises the benefit.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman 'not that worried' about rival Elon Musk's influence in the Trump administration
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, who is in a legal dispute with rival Elon Musk, said he is “not that worried” about Musk's influence in the incoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: AI catches cancer that mammogram misses
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Spotify Wrapped: How to view, share your personalized recap
item.description: Want to show everyone who your top five artists were or just how much time you spent listening to music and podcasts? Now is your chance.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: AWS amplifies developer tools with new gen AI features
item.description: AWS is leaving no stone unturned to get generative AI tools embedded into every aspect of application development. At its annual re:Invent conference, AWS CEO Matt Garman showcased a large of number of features and tools that the company has built for developers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Meta quietly leans on rival GPT-4 despite Zuckerberg’s bold Llama claims
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg has consistently championed Meta’s Llama AI model as a leader in generative AI technology, positioning it as a strong competitor to OpenAI and Google. However, behind the scenes, Meta is complementing Llama with a rival AI model to meet its internal needs.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Cython tutorial: How to speed up Python
item.description: Python is a powerful programming language that is easy to learn and easy to work with, but it is not always the fastest to run—especially when you’re dealing with math or statistics.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Intro to Express.js: Endpoints, parameters, and routes
item.description: Express.js is the most-used HTTP server and middleware platform for Node.js. Let’s take a hands-on look at what it brings to the table. Request handling with Express.js Handling requests over the Internet is one of the most frequent and common tasks in software development.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Arista adds intelligent switch stacking, management for campus networks
item.description: Arista Networks is adding new features to its campus networking portfolio to help enterprise customers more easily group and manage switches.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Federal Executive Forum Profiles in Excellence in Government: CIO Achievements 2024
item.description: Join host Luke McCormack as he discusses 2024 federal IT successes with top government and industry technology experts. The post Federal Executive Forum Profiles in Excellence in Government: CIO Achievements 2024 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: TikTok defends handling of Romania election content in grilling by EU lawmakers
item.description: BUCHAREST, Romania (AP) — TikTok took down several networks that tried to meddle in Romania's elections, executives said Tuesday as they defended the company's election integrity measures to European Union lawmakers.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN and STEPHEN McGRATH, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How AI agents will transform the future of work
item.description: At first, robotic process automation coupled with low-code platforms and orchestration tools propelled many organizations to increase productivity and scale business operations. Virtual agents and chatbots took automation one step further by enabling a conversational experience.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Helpful Hack: Siri's new tricks, photo magic and writing help with iOS 18.1's new AI features
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to update your iPhone to add Apple Intelligence, which he says can transform your interactions with your phone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
